_comment: Pools of generic word-category prompts handed to players each round. The AI weaves the submitted answers into a story, so these are deliberately just word categories (Mad Libs style) plus a few groom-flavoured ones. Edit freely. 'slotsPerPlayer' controls how many prompts each phone gets per round.

pools.label: Getting personal
prompts: something Matthew says when he's had too many
the dumbest thing Matthew has ever cried about
a place Matthew should never be allowed back into
something Matthew is weirdly proud of
the lie Matthew tells most often
Matthew's signature smell after a workout
the app Matthew uses way too much

pools.label: No mercy
prompts: something you'd never say in front of Jane's mom
the worst thing found in Matthew's search history
something that should stay at the bachelor party
a regret Matthew will have tomorrow morning
the reason the groom got kicked out
an outrageous bet Matthew would lose
